description: HTTP API endpoint monitoring for Chrono Queue — request rates, status codes, p50/p90/p95/p99 latency, Kafka publish performance, and API log stream.

panels.title: Services UP
panels.description: Count of Chrono Queue services whose Prometheus scrape target is currently UP.

panels.title: Total API Requests (Range)
panels.description: Total HTTP requests across selected applications (excluding actuator) over the dashboard time range.

panels.title: Success Rate %

targets.expr: clamp_max(clamp_min(100 * sum(clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"$app", env=~"$env", outcome="SUCCESS", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)) / clamp_min(sum(clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"$app", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)), 1e-9), 0), 100)

panels.description: Percentage of HTTP requests completing successfully, based on the current rate.

panels.title: HTTP Error Rate %

targets.expr: clamp_max(clamp_min(100 * sum(clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"$app", env=~"$env", status=~"4..|5..", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)) / clamp_min(sum(clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"$app", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)), 1e-9), 0), 100)

panels.description: Percentage of HTTP requests returning 4xx or 5xx status codes.

panels.title: p95 Latency
panels.description: 95th percentile HTTP request latency across all selected applications.

panels.title: p99 Latency
panels.description: 99th percentile HTTP request latency across all selected applications.

panels.title: Request Rate (r/s)
panels.description: Current HTTP request throughput in requests per second.

panels.title: Top 5 HTTP 5xx Endpoints
panels.description: Top 5 HTTP endpoints by current 5xx response rate, excluding actuator routes.

targets.expr: sum by (service) ((http_server_requests_active_seconds_gcount{service=~"$app", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}) or (http_server_requests_active_seconds_active_count{service=~"$app", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}))

panels.title: HTTP In-Flight Requests — Active Concurrency
panels.description: Number of HTTP requests currently being processed (active / in-flight) per application. Uses Micrometer LongTaskTimer active-count metric with compatibility fallback for both OpenMetrics variants (`http_server_requests_active_seconds_gcount` and `http_server_requests_active_seconds_active_count`). Sustained high values indicate thread-pool saturation or upstream blocking. Sudden spikes coinciding with p99 latency rises confirm concurrency-driven slowdowns.

panels.title: Request Rate by Endpoint & Method

targets.expr: sum by (service, method, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"$app", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0))

panels.description: HTTP request rate broken down by application, HTTP method, and URI.

panels.title: HTTP Status Code Distribution
panels.description: HTTP request rate per response status code, stacked to show composition.

panels.title: HTTP Error Budget Burn Rate

targets.expr: (sum(clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"$app", env=~"$env", status=~"5..", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)) or vector(0)) / clamp_min(sum(clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"$app", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)), 1e-9)

panels.description: Ratio of 5xx request rate to total HTTP request rate. Red threshold line marks the 99.9% SLO budget (0.1% error rate).

panels.title: 4xx / 5xx Error Rate Over Time
panels.description: Rate of client (4xx) and server (5xx) errors over time per application.

panels.title: Request Success vs Error — Stacked
panels.description: Stacked comparison of successful versus errored HTTP request throughput.

panels.title: Latency Percentiles — p50 / p90 / p95 / p99
job-producer — HTTP Latency Percentiles
panels.description: p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 HTTP latency for the job-producer service.

panels.title: dlq-service — HTTP Latency Percentiles
panels.description: p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 HTTP latency for the dlq-service.

panels.title: job-producer — p50/p90/p95/p99 per Endpoint

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: Per-endpoint p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 HTTP latency for job-producer.

panels.title: dlq-service — p50/p90/p95/p99 per Endpoint

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: Per-endpoint p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 HTTP latency for dlq-service.

targets.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, service, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service=~"$app", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0))))

panels.title: Top 10 Slowest Endpoints — p99 Latency
panels.description: Top 10 HTTP endpoints ranked by p99 latency. Computed as a point-in-time snapshot over the selected rate interval.

panels.title: Kafka Producer Send Rate by Topic (records/s)
panels.description: Kafka producer record send rate by topic for job-producer.

panels.title: Kafka Producer Request Latency avg (ms)
panels.description: Average Kafka producer request latency for job-producer.

panels.title: Kafka Producer Error Rate
panels.description: Kafka producer record error rate by topic for job-producer.

panels.title: job-producer — API Request Logs

targets.expr: {service="job-producer"} |~ "Job submission request received|Job accepted|Job event published"

panels.description: Filtered API request logs for the job-producer service.

panels.title: dlq-service — API Request Logs

targets.expr: {service="dlq"} |~ "GET /api/dlq|DLQ query returned|Consuming DLQ message|DLQ job persisted and acknowledged|Failed to persist DLQ job"

panels.description: Filtered API request logs for the dlq-service.

title: Chrono Queue — API Endpoints
